breakdown: PR adds a RewardsBox TypedDict and validate_rewards_box() function to enforce schema on the rewards_box data structure. Tests are comprehensive, covering valid data acceptance, required field enforcement, type validation for boolean/int/list fields, unknown field rejection, and non-dict input handling. Implementation appears solid but diff is truncated so full validation logic and TypedDict definition aren't visible.
key_changes: Added RewardsBox TypedDict definition in custom_types.py
Added comprehensive test suite test_rewards_box_schema.py with 10 test cases
Validation checks required fields: level_up_available, xp_gained, current_xp, next_level_xp, gold, loot, source
Type validation rejects wrong types for boolean, int, and list fields
